messages.content:
Identify and define the type of vulnerability described in the CVE.

SQL Injection vulnerability discovered in Gila CMS 1.15.4 and earlier allows a remote attacker to execute arbitrary web scripts via the Area parameter under the Administration>Widget tab after the login portal.
The vulnerability is an SQL Injection (SQLi), a type of injection attack that allows attackers to interfere with the queries that an application makes to its database.
